# External Data

Contains supplementary data from outside the main dataset. Typically used for feature enrichment or cross-validation purposes.

## External Data List

| File | Source | Used For |
|---|---|---|
| [filename.csv] | [URL / institution name] | [e.g., adding location features] |

## Notes

- Ensure all external data has a license that permits use in this project
- Always document the date the data was retrieved, as external sources may change over time
